[{"title": "A guide to the commission marketplace revenue model7 Commission Structure Examples to Maximize Sales in 2025Commission CalculatorCommissionStatement: Calculating Commissions Made Easy with ExcelA guide to thecommissionmarketplace revenuemodel7CommissionStructure Examples to Maximize Sales in 2025A guide to thecommissionmarketplace revenuemodelSales Commission Models Explained - LinkedIn", "url": "https://cedcommerce.com/blog/the-commission-based-marketplace-revenue-model/", "snippet": "[DDG Snippet] Apr 8, 2022 \u00b7Let\u2019s deep dive into the how and why thecommission-based marketplacebusinessmodelpowers the most successful online marketplaces, including Airbnb, Amazon, eBay, Etsy, Uber, etc.Aug 29, 2025 \u00b7For example, a B2B SaaS salesperson at a company like Salesforce might have a $75,000 base salary and earn a10%commissionon new contracts, while a medical device representative will have a similar structure to compensate for extensive training and relationship management duties.This calculator can computecommissionsfor three different types ofcommissionstructures:commissiononly, base salary pluscommission, and tieredcommission.What is a typical commission structure for a business?Different businesses and industries have unique approaches tocommission; some may offer a simple percentage of sales, while others might have multi-tiered structures that consider factors suchasproduct type, sales volume, or new client acquisition.What is a commission-based marketplace business model?The well-known marketplaces runningonacommission-based marketplacebusiness modelinclude the following: Airbnb: It charges a10%commissionfrom the hosts and 3% from the travelers. AliExpress: The marketplace charges sellers acommissionof 5% to10% dependingonthe sold products\u2019 category.How do I choose the best commission structure for my business?Your answer will immediately narrow down the most suitable commission structures.Analyze Your Sales Cycle & Business Model: A short, transactional sales cycle in a high-volume business might thrive on a straight commission plan.What is a commission-based Marketplace revenue model?In a commission-based marketplace revenue model,owners earn a share from each transaction processed on the marketplace. Owners can charge a commission at a fixed percentage or fixed flat fees. As a marketplace scales and the transactions it processes increase, owners can earn more commissions.Apr 25, 2023 \u00b7In thismodel, salespeople earn a percentage of the revenue they generate. For example, a salesperson might make a10%commissiononeachsale. According to our [2024 State of Incentive Compensation Management Report](https://stateoficmreport.captivateiq.com/), one-third of incentive compensation leaders manage variable compensation for over 1,000 reps. Additionally, 37% of respondents report spending too much time on manual tasks \u2014 like revenue planning \u2014 which keeps them from fully focusing on strategic decisions. To help alleviate this burden, we\u2019ve created a series of Google Sheets and Excel templates designed to simplify calculations for the most common sales commission structures. Because your commission plan will vary depending on a number of variables \u2014like industry, size of your sales team, or commission percentage \u2014we've analyzed the most common types of sales commission structures and built a sale commission calculator with examples for each. In each sales commission template, you\u2019ll find: *   A detailed overview of the sale commission template; *   The purpose each template serves based on different sales commission structures; *   How to customize the Google Sheets or Excel template to your unique needs.  We\u2019ve also included screenshots and examples to ensure you can make the most of each sales commission structure template \u2014no matter your use case. By the end of this article, you\u2019ll have a comprehensive set of resources to help you manage your [sales commissions](https://www.captivateiq.com/blog/sales-commission) with ease and accuracy.
